---
title: "[Welcome]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
subtitle: "[2nd SARA Coding Bootcamp <br> 20-22 Mar 2026 $\\cdot$ Sonipat (HR)]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
#author: "[SARA Institute of Data Science, Sonipat, Haryana, India]{.clr-white .r-fit-text}"
page-title: "Welcome"
format: revealjs
progress: true
controls: true
slide-number: true
scrollable: true
menu: true
logo: images/logo-sara.png
transition: slide
#bibliography: references.bib
theme: style.scss
filters:
  - roughnotation
footer: "[https://sara-institute.quarto.pub/stats-course/](https://sara-institute.quarto.pub/stats-course/)"
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621947081720-86970823b77a?q=80&w=1932&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D"
  data-background-size: "cover"
  data-background-color: "black"
  data-background-opacity: "0.5"
---

##  {background-image="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1615715035868-fc94bd5ffdac?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D" background-size="cover" background-repeat="repeat"}

<br> <br>

::::::: centering
:::::: columns
::: {.column width="36%"}
![**GYAN JYOTI [SA]{.clr-red}VITRIBAI PHULE (1831-1897)**<br>🌺 🙏🏽
🌼](images/intro/savitrimai.png){width="70%"}
:::

::: {.column width="29%"}
<br>

![](images/logo-sara.png){width="2.0in" fig-align="center"}
:::

::: {.column width="34.75%"}
![**MATA [RA]{.clr-red}MABAI AMBEDKAR (1898-1935)**<br>🌺 🙏🏽
🌼](images/intro/ramai.png){width="70%"}
:::
::::::

[**Savitribai Ramabai (SARA) Institute of Data Science**]{.r-fit-text}
:::::::

## SARA Institute of Data Science

> First class was on 5 April 2023 in Bhiwadi, RJ.

::: centering
![](images/intro/terra-sara.jpg){width="78%"}
:::

## Our Mission {background-image="images/intro/mission.jpg" background-size="contain" background-position="right"}

> Democratize Data Science

. . .

> Making coding accessible to all.

. . .

> Priority admission for <br>marginalized communities and <br>women.

## Free & Open-source Courses

<br>

::::::: {.centering layout-ncol="4" layout-valign="bottom"}
::: card
![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503676260728-1c00da094a0b?q=80&w=2922&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)

English Language
:::

::: card
![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1649433391420-542fcd3835ea?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)

Computer Skills
:::

::: card
![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551288049-bebda4e38f71?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)

Data Science
:::

::: card
![](https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1508004680771-708b02aabdc0?q=80&w=2940&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D)

Research Methods
:::
:::::::

::: aside
Image source: [Unsplash](https://unsplash.com/)
:::

## Free Data Science Trainings {background-color="#001b3a"}

> [Data Schools & Bootcamp]{.clr-white}

![Jan 2026, 2nd SARA Winter School "Statistics using R".](images/intro/batch5.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

![July 2025, 2nd SARA Summer School "R for Researchers".](images/intro/batch4.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

![Mar 2025, 1st SARA Bootcamp "Publish using Quarto"](images/intro/batch3.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![Dec 2024, 1st SARA Winter School "Statistics using R"](images/intro/batch2.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

![July 2024, 1st SARA Summer School "Reproducible Research Using R".](images/intro/batch1.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

## Workshop Collaborations {background-color="#001b3a"}

> [Hands-on data sci education to organizations nationwide.]{.clr-white}

::: {layout-ncol="2" layout-nrow="4"}

![Oct 2025, Dept. of Sociology, Delhi Uni.](images/intro/du.jpg)

![Aug 2025, Institute of Development Studies, Jaipur](images/intro/jaipur.png)

![Jul 2025, Faculty of GJU, Hisar](images/intro/gju-online2.jpg)

![Oct 2024, Center for Political Studies, JNU, Delhi](images/intro/jnu-talk-participants.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![June 2024, Professor of GJU, Hisar](images/intro/gju-online.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![May 2024, Dept. of Food Tech. GJU, Hisar](images/intro/gju.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![May 2024, SRM University, Sonipat](images/intro/srm1.jpg)

![Dec 2023, Dept of Economics, MDU, Rohtak](images/intro/mdu.jpg){fig-align="center"}
:::

## SARA Saksharta Mission {background-color="#001b3a"}

> [Awareness about Data Science Education & Opportunities.]{.clr-white}

::: {layout-ncol="2" layout-nrow="3"}
![](images/intro/visit1.jpg)

![](images/intro/visit4.jpg)

![](images/intro/visit6.jpg)

![](images/intro/visit5.jpg)

![](images/intro/visit2.jpg)

![](images/intro/visit3.jpg)
:::

## SARA in News {background-color="#001b3a"}

{{< video https://youtu.be/c0ZJQSdoWXI?si=HKRjVfOHuJ1zME1b width="100%" height="75%" >}}

::: aside
Thank You! [*News Beak*](https://thenewsbeak.in/) team.
:::

## Support SARA {background-image="images/intro/babasaheb.jpg" background-size="contain" background-position="right" background-color="#001b3a"}

<br> <br>

> [Teach at SARA.]{.clr-white}

. . .

> [Donate to SARA.]{.clr-white}

# {{< fa brands whatsapp >}} Follow<br>SARA {background-color="seagreen" background-image="images/intro/sara-channel.jpeg" background-position="right" background-size="contain"}

Receive Courses, Scholarships, & Talks <br>Updates on your WhatsApp.

# {{< fa handshake >}} Donate<br>to SARA {background-color="#001b3a" background-image="images/intro/upi-sara.png" background-position="right" background-size="contain"}

No Amount is too Small.

## 

:::::: columns
::: {.column .centering width="30%"}
<br> <br>

![Savitribai Ramabai (SARA) Institute of Data
Science](images/logo-sara.png)
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::

::: {.column .r-fit-text width="60%"}
<br> <br>

**Dr. Ajay Kumar Koli**, <br>Executive Director, SARA Institute

**Dr. Kiran Lata**, <br>Director, SARA Institute

{{< fa location-dot >}} Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan, <br>Kakroi Road, Near
Dayanand Hospital, <br>nipat - 131001, Haryana, India.

<br>

{{< fa mobile-screen >}}   925 315 2024 <br> {{< fa envelope >}}  
[sara.institute.info\@gmail.com](mailto:%20sara.institute.info@gmail.com)
<br> SARA Website   <https://sara-edu.netlify.app/>

<br> Follow SARA Institute on Social Media.<br>

[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/sara-edu)  
[{{< fa brands twitter >}}](https://twitter.com/sara_institute)  
[{{< fa brands facebook >}}](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61564043738390)
  [{{< fa brands youtube >}}](https://www.youtube.com/@SARADataScience)
 
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/company/sara-institute/)
 
[{{< fa brands whatsapp >}}](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va4r7rGLCoWycMwThl2J)
 
[{{< fa brands instagram >}}](https://www.instagram.com/sara_data_sci/)
:::
::::::

#  {background-image="images/intro/flyer.png" background-position="right" background-size="contain" background-color="#001b3a"}

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
[2nd SARA <br>Bootcamp]{.r-fit-text}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
:::
:::::

## {background-image="images/intro/women-flyer.png" background-size="contain" background-color="#001b3a"}

## {background-image="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1615715035868-fc94bd5ffdac?q=80&w=2070&auto=format&fit=crop&ixlib=rb-4.0.3&ixid=M3wxMjA3fDB8MHxwaG90by1wYWdlfHx8fGVufDB8fHx8fA%3D%3D" background-size="cover"}

<br>
<br>

:::: {.centering}

![](images/intro/sonipat-bhawan.png)

[***The Ambedkar <br>Educational Society Sonipat***]{.r-fit-text}

::::

## Schedule Overview

::: {.incremental}

- Around [25 hours]{.rn-fragment rn-color=lightgreen} of residential teaching in 3 days.

- [FREE for all Female participants.]{.rn-fragment rn-color=orange}      

- [No tuition fee.]{.clr-tom} But three days food & accommodation charges Rs.3000 only for male participants.

-   **Feedback** on the last day of the event.

-   [**Thank You Ceremony!**]{.rn-fragment rn-color=tomato} on Sunday, 22 Mar 2026, 7-8 PM 🚂

-   **e-Certificate** for the participation via email.

- Course Website: <https://sara-institute.quarto.pub/stats-course/>

::: 

## Daily Schedule:

::: panel-tabset
### {{< fa utensils >}} Food

| Activity             | Time                        |       
|----------------------|-----------------------------|
| {{< fa coffee >}} Breakfast | 08:30 AM to 09:30 AM |
| {{< fa sun >}} Lunch        | 01:30 PM to 02:30 PM |
| {{< fa moon >}} Dinner      | 07:30 PM to 08:30 PM |

### {{< fa laptop >}} Lectures

| Activity         | Time                               |
|------------------|---------------------------|
| **{{< fa line-chart >}} Class 1** | **10:00 AM to 11:30 AM**  |
| {{< fa refresh >}} Discussion | 30 minutes            |
| **{{< fa line-chart >}} Class 2**  | **12:00 AM to 01:30 PM**  |
| **{{< fa line-chart >}} Class 3**  | **02:30 PM to 04:00 PM**  |
| {{< fa refresh >}} Discussion | 30 minutes            |
| **{{< fa line-chart >}} Class 4** | **04:30 PM to 06:00 PM**  |

:::

## Code of Conduct

::: {.incremental}

- **Be respectful and kind** to everyone.

- **Ask questions freely** – no question is too small.

- **Bring your own internet** – mobile hotspot or data plan required.

- **Arrive 5 minutes early** to settle in before each session.

- **Location:** All classes will be held at **Mata Ramabai Auditorium, 1st Floor, Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan.**

:::

## Contact Numbers:

| Name                                                     | Mobile       |
|--------------------|----------|
| **SARA** Office                                              | 925 315 2024 |
| **Dr. Ajay Kumar**, Ex. Director, SARA                   | 88868 10879  |
| **Dr. Kiran Koli**, Director, SARA                          | 81680 60500  |
| **Mr. Rajesh Kataria**, President <br>Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan  | 90134 99562  |
| **Mr. Raj Pal**, Supervisor <br>Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan            | 93063 42596  |

## [Any questions?]{.clr-white} {background-image="https://cdn.myportfolio.com/45214904-6a61-4e23-98d6-b140f8654a40/596ce690-7bab-4a5f-b319-e0e0c79d8a22.png?h=11bf95fbc83053b176f82bc2daacf689" background-size="contain"}
